target.findings: Q4 FY2025 EPS missed estimates while annual FY2025 EPS beat; insider selling and debt-offering headlines keep the near-term tone cautious.

results.summary: JPMorgan remains the quality leader on profitability, but Q4 miss and insider selling drove a negative short-term tone.
